violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Bottle of soap was placed at sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Sticks of rodenticides was observed not in a tamper proof box. PIC disposed of rodenticide. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The door to the outside, located in the prep area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

A small accumulation of rodent droppings was observed in the corner of the back prep area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC contacted pest control at the time of inspection. Pest control is coming out to service establishment later today. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. PIC stated ice machine will be cleaned end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
